fields.name: Медеу
fields.description: World's largest outdoor ice rink at 1691m — 10.5ha of ice. Over 120 world speed skating records set here.

fields.name: Чимбулак
fields.description: World-class ski resort: 2200–3163m, 24 runs, 7 lifts. Summer: trekking, zipline, mountain biking.

fields.name: Большое Алматинское озеро
fields.description: Alpine lake at 2510m, water shifts from turquoise to emerald. Kazakhstan's best landscape photo — Aug-Sep.

fields.name: Чарынский каньон
fields.description: Kazakhstan's Grand Canyon: red cliffs to 300m, Valley of Castles, relict ash grove — the only one in the world.

fields.name: Кольсайские озёра
fields.description: Three cascading mountain lakes: 1818/2252/2850m. Turquoise water, ancient spruces, waterfall trails.

fields.name: Алтын-Эмель: Поющий Бархан
fields.description: 150m / 3km dune. Emits organ-like sound in the wind — a physics mystery. Nearby: Aktau mountains, petroglyphs, saiga antelopes.

fields.name: Парк 28 панфиловцев
fields.description: 1904 Ascension Cathedral — a timber masterpiece, not a single nail. Memorial of Glory, Eternal Flame.

fields.name: Зелёный базар
fields.description: Central market since 1875. Mountains of spices, kurt, kumiss, horse meat. Best cultural immersion.

fields.name: Коктобе
fields.description: Mountain park at 1100m: cable car 10 min from center with full Almaty views. TV tower, Beatles statue, restaurants.

fields.name: Монумент независимости
fields.description: 6m Golden Man on winged snow leopard — national symbol. Republic Square with 10 history bas-reliefs.

fields.name: Музей им. Кастеева
fields.description: 22,000 exhibits — Central Asia's largest art collection. Kazakh folk art, 19th–20th c. paintings.

fields.name: Центральная мечеть
fields.description: City's main mosque: gold domes with Quranic mosaic, turquoise tiles. Free entry, dress code required.

fields.name: Проспект Жибек Жолы
fields.description: Almaty's Arbat: restaurants, cafes, souvenirs, street artists. Especially lively Friday evenings.

fields.name: Гостиница «Казахстан»
fields.description: Soviet 1977 skyscraper, earthquake-resistant (8 magnitude). Rooftop bar — panorama of city and Tian Shan.

fields.name: Ресторан Navat
fields.description: Best Kazakh cuisine restaurant: authentic yurts, live dombra, beshbarmak, kazy, kuyrdak, kumiss.

fields.name: Seafood Market
fields.description: Market-restaurant: choose a live crab/oyster/lobster → they cook it. Best seafood in the city.

fields.name: Бар French 42
fields.description: Almaty's best cocktail bar (2GIS 2024). Signature cocktails by top bartenders, French bistro.

fields.name: Ночной клуб Studio 69
fields.description: Almaty's main club: multiple dancefloors, VIP zones, world-class guest DJs. Dress code.

fields.name: ТРЦ Esentai Mall
fields.description: Luxury mall: Gucci, Prada, Louis Vuitton, Rolex. Esentai Gallery — contemporary art. Mountain view restaurants.

fields.name: Baraka Market
fields.description: Best Kazakh designer market: jewelry, clothing, natural cosmetics, artisan souvenirs. Every weekend.

fields.name: Баня «Арасан»
fields.description: Legendary Soviet bathhouse (1982) in city center. Russian + Turkish + Finnish + pools.

fields.name: Озеро Иссык
fields.description: Mountain lake 1756m, 70km from Almaty. Day trip: picnic, clean air. Famous for the Issyk Golden Warrior.

fields.name: Бутаковский водопад
fields.description: Zailiysky Alatau gorge: lower (15m) and upper waterfalls. Start right from Almaty — no car needed. 3h round trip.

fields.name: Поход на Фурманова
fields.description: Main urban hike: 2200m, 4h round trip right from the city. Spruces, gorge, Almaty viewpoint.

fields.name: Источники Алма-Арасан
fields.description: Thermal springs in the mountains, 30 min from center. Bathing in hot wooden tubs right in the forest.

fields.name: Ботанический сад
fields.description: 5000+ plant species, tulips in spring (Mar–Apr), rose garden in summer. Silence in the city center.

fields.name: Алматы Арена
fields.description: Multipurpose complex: 12,000 seats, ice arena, world concerts. Hockey, figure skating, UFC events.

fields.name: Центральный парк
fields.description: Large city park: Ferris wheel, rides, bike/scooter rental, playgrounds, cafes.

fields.name: Кофейня Coffee Boom
fields.description: Specialty coffee flagship: signature desserts, all-day breakfasts. Multiple locations. Creative class gathering spot.

fields.name: Ресторан Bau
fields.description: Gastro-restaurant of new-generation Kazakh cuisine. Reinvention of beshbarmak, sorpa, baursak.

fields.name: Essentai Gallery
fields.description: Central Asia's best contemporary art gallery: Kazakh and international artists. Exhibitions, lectures.

fields.name: Театр оперы и балета
fields.description: Kazakhstan's main opera house: world-class productions, ballet, opera. Soviet hall, 1072 seats.

fields.name: Государственный цирк
fields.description: One of Central Asia's best circuses: acrobats, trained animals, aerial gymnasts.

fields.name: Параплан с инструктором
fields.description: Paragliding from Kok-Tobe mountain. 15–20 min over Almaty. City, Tian Shan, steppe view.

fields.name: Зиплайн Чимбулак
fields.description: Zipline over Chimbulak gorges — 100 km/h over the abyss. 500m track, mountain panorama.

fields.name: Рафтинг на Чилике
fields.description: Rafting on the Chilik mountain river, 2h from Almaty. Class 3–4 rapids, scenic banks.

fields.name: Ночной клуб Chocolate
fields.description: Premium club: Ibiza-style, international DJs, VIP booths. Dress code required.

fields.name: Бар SKY17
fields.description: Restobar on the 17th floor with city panorama. Signature cocktails, European cuisine, hookahs.

fields.name: Петроглифы Тамгалы
fields.description: Bronze Age petroglyphs — UNESCO site 170km. 5000 carvings: sun-headed figures, hunting, rituals.

fields.name: Алматинский зоопарк
fields.description: Zoo with 300+ animal species: snow leopards, steppe eagles, Bactrian camels. Reconstructed in 2020.

fields.name: Конные прогулки в горах
fields.description: Horse riding through Zailiysky Alatau gorges: 2 to 8 hours. Glaciers, alpine meadows, mountain rivers.

fields.name: Стрит-арт тур по Алматы
fields.description: 50+ works by Kazakh and international artists across the city. With guide or self-guided.

fields.name: Мастер-класс по юрте
fields.description: Assembly/disassembly of a traditional Kazakh yurt: felt, kerege. Tea and baursak at the end.

fields.name: Айтыс (поэтическое состязание)
fields.description: Aytys — poetic competition of akyns: live improvisation to the dombra. Unique Kazakh oral poetry.

fields.name: Улица Панфилова (вечерний маршрут)
fields.description: Pedestrian street: cafes, bars, art galleries, antique shops. Soviet architecture, cozy courtyards.

fields.name: Tash Kebab House
fields.description: Almaty's best shashlik. Argentine beef, lamb, ribs over charcoal. Garden restaurant with live fire.

fields.name: Квест-комнаты Escape City
fields.description: 15+ scenarios from horror to historical. Team of 2–6. For corporate events and families.

fields.name: Ресторан Noni
fields.description: Trendy restaurant: breakfasts, business lunches, evening DJ sets. Top of RestoLife 2024.

fields.name: Тандырная самса (Зелёный базар)
fields.description: Hot samsa from the tandoor — quintessence of Almaty street food. 300–500 KZT.

fields.name: Спа Rixos Almaty
fields.description: Almaty's best spa: hammam, sauna, mountain-view pool, 90 min massage.

fields.name: Дендрологический парк
fields.description: Arboretum with rare trees from around the world. Cozy alleys, fountains. For morning runs.

fields.name: Крафтовые бары Алматы
fields.description: Almaty craft movement: Hop Brewery, Malt House, Local Craft bars. Almaty hops, original recipes.

fields.name: Семиреченский музей
fields.description: Almaty history from founding to today: old photos, Kazakh kibitka, Soviet everyday life.

fields.name: Кинотеатр IMAX Цесна
fields.description: Main cinema: IMAX, Dolby Atmos, lounge halls. Kazakh premieres and global blockbusters.

fields.name: Байтерек
fields.description: Astana symbol: 105m tower, observation deck at 97m. Golden orb with president's handprint.

fields.name: Хан Шатыр
fields.description: Mall by Norman Foster: Kazakhstan's largest. Waterpark with beach, ice rink, internal monorail.

fields.name: Мечеть Хазрет Султан
fields.description: Central Asia's largest mosque: 11,000 m², 10,000 worshippers, 77m minarets. White marble.

fields.name: Дворец Мира и Согласия
fields.description: 62m pyramid by Norman Foster. Opera hall, Congress of World Religions, ethnographic museum.

fields.name: Нац. музей Казахстана
fields.description: 74,000 m² — Central Asia's largest museum. 'Golden Man' — 4th c. BC Saka warrior with 4000 gold items.

fields.name: Бульвар Нуржол
fields.description: Main tourist route: 3km from Akorda to Khan Shatyr. Singing fountains in evening, golden towers, Bayterek.

fields.name: Астана Опера
fields.description: 1500-seat neoclassical opera house. Best acoustics in Central Asia. World productions, ballet, opera.

fields.name: ЭКСПО 2017 Sphere
fields.description: Sphere — world's largest spherical building (80m diameter). Interactive future energy pavilions.

fields.name: Акорда
fields.description: White palace with blue dome and golden spire — Kazakhstan's political heart. View from Nurzol boulevard.

fields.name: «Атамекен» (карта Казахстана)
fields.description: 2ha park-map: 300+ miniature replicas of all Kazakhstan's landmarks outdoors.

fields.name: Набережная р. Есиль
fields.description: River trams (May–Sept), cycling paths, skate park, cafes. Evening reflections of skyscrapers.

fields.name: Астана Балет
fields.description: Kazakhstan's only ballet theater. Contemporary choreography by Kazakh and world masters.

fields.name: Музей первого президента
fields.description: Nazarbayev biography: state gifts (gold, jewelry, weapons), personal items, documents.

fields.name: Рестобар SKY17
fields.description: 17th floor with Astana center panorama. Signature cuisine, cocktails, hookahs.

fields.name: Tumara Restaurant
fields.description: Astana's top Kazakh restaurant: beshbarmak in a kazan, kuyrdak, lagman. Live dombra on weekends.

fields.name: Ailand (парк аттракционов)
fields.description: Kazakhstan's largest indoor park: roller coaster, waterpark, trampolines, bowling. Year-round.

fields.name: Аквапарк Хан Шатыр
fields.description: Tropical waterpark with beach in Astana — while outside it's -30°C! Slides, waves, artificial beach.

fields.name: Нац. театр драмы
fields.description: Kazakhstan's main theater: Kazakh and world drama. Contemporary directors, star actors.

fields.name: Поющие фонтаны Нуржол
fields.description: Evening musical shows with colored lighting. Golden Towers, Bayterek, Akorda around. 20:00–22:00.

fields.name: Rixos Astana Spa
fields.description: Five-star spa complex: hammam, pool, various massage types. Astana's best wellness.

fields.name: Hop House Astana
fields.description: Astana's best craft bar: local beer, signature cocktails, live music on Fridays.

fields.name: Жайлы клуб
fields.description: Astana's main nightclub: Kazakh and international DJs, multiple rooms, rooftop terrace.

fields.name: Ледовый дворец Алау
fields.description: Olympic ice palace: speed skating, hockey, figure skating. Public skating rental.

fields.name: Коргалжын: фламинго
fields.description: 130km from Astana: reserve with pink flamingos — world's largest nesting colony! 300+ bird species. UNESCO.

fields.name: Океанариум Думан
fields.description: Central Asia's largest aquarium, 1500km from the nearest sea: sharks, rays, tropical fish. Tunnel.

fields.name: Зоопарк Астаны
fields.description: New 2021 zoo: giraffes, hippos, tigers, snow leopards. One of Central Asia's best zoos.

fields.name: Ресторан «Самрук» (крыша)
fields.description: Rooftop restaurant with Astana's best view: left bank panorama. Signature Kazakh cuisine, cocktails.

fields.name: Mangal House
fields.description: Astana's best meat and grill. Steaks, ribeye, lamb. Open kitchen, charcoal, fire atmosphere.

fields.name: Велотур по Астане
fields.description: Cycling tour of the left bank: Bayterek, Nurzol, embankment, EXPO. 3h with guide.

fields.name: Космическая школа при ЭКСПО
fields.description: Space museum: ISS simulators, spacesuits, Baikonur history. Interactive.

fields.name: Стадион Астана Арена
fields.description: 30,500-seat stadium — home of FC Astana and Kazakhstan national team. Europa League matches.

fields.name: Red Bus Hop-On Hop-Off
fields.description: Tourist double-decker bus: route through all landmarks with audio guide. 24h ticket.

fields.name: ЦУМ на правом берегу
fields.description: Largest shopping center of the right bank: Kazakh brands, souvenir market, food products.

fields.name: Буддийский храм «Тибетский Лотос»
fields.description: Astana's only Buddhist temple: Tibetan architecture, colorful statues. Open to all faiths.

fields.name: Резиденция Санта-Клауса
fields.description: Winter park: huskies, ice sculptures, slides, snowmobiles. Dec–Jan. Unforgettable for children.

fields.name: Конгресс-Холл
fields.description: Palace of Independence — Kazakhstan's largest congress center. International forums, gala concerts.

fields.name: Музей современного искусства
fields.description: Young museum: Kazakh contemporary art, video art, installations. Provocative and interesting.

fields.name: Шахматный клуб «Белая ладья»
fields.description: Kazakhstan's main chess club: tournaments, grandmasters. Kazakhstan — top chess nation.

fields.name: Боулинг и развлечения
fields.description: Entertainment center: 24-lane bowling, billiards, arcades, cafe. For an evening with friends or family.

fields.name: Цитадель (Старый город)
fields.description: Hill with 2200 years of history: ruler's palace, Silk Road trading square. Bronze Age layers uncovered.

fields.name: Парк Жайлауколь
fields.description: Main park: artificial lake with boats, Golden Eye Ferris wheel (50m), rides.

fields.name: Родник Кошкар-Ата
fields.description: Sacred spring +11°C in city center. Student of Yasawi, 12th c. Pilgrimage site.

fields.name: Краеведческий музей
fields.description: Museum since 1920: 4 halls — archaeology, ethnography, numismatics, history.

fields.name: Арбат Шымкента
fields.description: Main pedestrian street: cafes, boutiques, cycling paths. Musical fountain in the evening.

fields.name: Центральная мечеть
fields.description: City's main mosque: 8516 m², 3000 worshippers. Contemporary Islamic design.

fields.name: Аксу-Жабаглинский заповедник
fields.description: Oldest CA reserve (1926): snow leopards, Regel's tulip, 260 bird species. 550m canyon. UNESCO.

fields.name: Кафе «Жеті тандыр»
fields.description: Legendary cafe: samsa from tandoor, kuyrdak, beshbarmak, shashlik. Locals' favorite.

fields.name: Мавзолеи Сайрама
fields.description: Sayram — 2700 years, 10km from Shymkent. Mausoleum of Karashash-ana (Yasawi's mother). Pilgrimage.

fields.name: Петроглифы Боралдая
fields.description: Bronze Age rock carvings — UNESCO site. 70km, thousands of images.

fields.name: Этно-парк «Қазына»
fields.description: Shanyrak monument, alley of miniature sacred sites, 550th anniversary Khanate sculpture.

fields.name: Парк ShymCity (2024)
fields.description: Brand new 2024 park: art objects, fountains, cafes, children's zones. Most modern in the city.

fields.name: Ресторан Саксаул
fields.description: Eastern cuisine: lagman, samsa, plov, shashlik. One of the city's best per Restoran.kz.

fields.name: Квас Барно
fields.description: Shymkent's legendary kvass: natural, bread-based, live. The kvass from Soviet childhood. Queue.

fields.name: Разливное мороженое
fields.description: Iconic draught ice cream — unique to Kazakhstan. Soviet pavilion with huge queues.

fields.name: Ресторан BOZJYRA
fields.description: Top restaurant by rating: signature cuisine, beautiful interior. For business and romance.

fields.name: Barkhan Burger
fields.description: City's best burgers: marbled beef, double patties, signature sauces.

fields.name: DePier (французская кофейня)
fields.description: French coffee shop: maritozzo, croissants, Dubai chocolate crepe.

fields.name: Pecorino (сыроварня)
fields.description: Family restaurant with cheesemaking: they make cheese right in front of you. Refined menu.

fields.name: ChefStar (завтраки 24/7)
fields.description: Place where breakfast is served 24 hours: pancakes, croissants, smoothies, eggs benedict.

fields.name: Gravity Shymkent (батуты)
fields.description: Trampoline and extreme park: foam pit, trampolines, ropes course, climbing wall.

fields.name: Пещера Акмечеть-Аулие
fields.description: Underground chamber — 'Paradise Gardens'. Place of power, legend says prayers bring children.

fields.name: Сайрам-Угамский нац. парк
fields.description: Mountain park with glaciers, rivers, alpine meadows. Borders Kyrgyzstan and Uzbekistan.

fields.name: Мечеть Дәуітұлы (Джами)
fields.description: Shymkent's oldest mosque in 'ayvan' style with open columned terrace — unique in Kazakhstan.

fields.name: Ресторан Камшат
fields.description: Traditional Kazakh restaurant: beshbarmak, naryn, koktal, baursak. Family banquets.

fields.name: Театр Шымкента
fields.description: Kazakh musical-drama theater: Kazakh-language repertoire, folk plays.

fields.name: Производственный тур: ковры
fields.description: Factory tour: watch Kazakh ornamental carpets being woven. Often free with option to buy.

fields.name: Lavash Center (стрит-фуд)
fields.description: Cult street food center: lavash wraps, authentic Eastern street food. Queues — a sign of quality.

fields.name: Шымкент → Туркестан (тур)
fields.description: 3h from Shymkent: Yasawi Mausoleum, Kultobe, Rabia Begim Mausoleum. Most popular day tour.

fields.name: Bike Park Шымкент
fields.description: Bicycle park and MTB trails in hills. Rentals, coaching, weekend races.

fields.name: Мавзолей Ходжи Ахмеда Ясави
fields.description: UNESCO World Heritage — Kazakhstan's top landmark. Tamerlane, 14th c. Blue 22m tiles, bronze taijkazan cauldron.

fields.name: Крепость Культобе
fields.description: Reconstructed 6th–12th century open-air citadel. Towers, walls, medieval streets.

fields.name: Мавзолей Гаухар-Ана
fields.description: Tomb of Yasawi's daughter, 15th c. Mosaic cladding, high vaults.

fields.name: Джума-мечеть
fields.description: Mosque with Indian wooden columns, 12th–14th c. Wooden forest in a stone desert.

fields.name: Мавзолей Рабии Султан Бегим
fields.description: Mausoleum of Tamerlane's granddaughter, 15th c. Tile panels with geometric ornament.

fields.name: Парк «7 граней Великой Степи»
fields.description: New park with arch, alleys, waterfall. Best sunset spot by the Syr Darya river.

fields.name: Летающий театр
fields.description: 4D cinema with flying sensation over Kazakhstan's historical sites. Seats lift, wind blows.

fields.name: Туркестан Арена
fields.description: 20,000-seat stadium in Islamic style. FC Turkestan matches.

fields.name: Хаммам Туркестана
fields.description: Medieval hammam at the reserve: hot plunge pools, steam, massage. As a thousand years ago.

fields.name: Мавзолей Укаша-ата
fields.description: Mausoleum of the Prophet's companion, 47km away. Sacred well connected to Mecca.

fields.name: Городище Отрар
fields.description: Ruins of Otrar — key Silk Road node. Genghis Khan died here (1227).

fields.name: Городище Сауран
fields.description: Medieval city 14th–18th c., 40km away. Walls, towers, irrigation. Best-preserved.

fields.name: Ресторан Дастархан Ясави
fields.description: Best restaurant by the mausoleum walls. Beshbarmak, plov, kuyrdak, tandoor samsa.

fields.name: Мечеть Хильвет
fields.description: Underground cave mosque 13th c. next to Yasawi. Khoja Ahmed meditated here for 40 days.

fields.name: Туркестанский музей
fields.description: Regional history museum: Silk Road, Kazakh khanates, medieval artifacts.

fields.name: Пещера Акмечеть-Аулие
fields.description: Cave mosque 'White Mosque' carved in rock. Pilgrimage site with healing legend.

fields.name: Мавзолей Арыстан-Баба
fields.description: Yasawi's spiritual teacher. 14th c. mausoleum 40km away. Pilgrimage traditionally starts here.

fields.name: Туркестанский амфитеатр
fields.description: Modern 1000-seat amphitheater. Horse shows, local artists.

fields.name: Каньон Шаян (Каратау)
fields.description: Little-known canyon in Karatau mountains. Wild nature, horse herds, tulips in spring.

fields.name: Hampton by Hilton Туркестан
fields.description: First international hotel 3-min from mausoleum. Modern comfort + Eastern design.

fields.name: Поющий фонтан-лотос
fields.description: Lotus-shaped fountain: evening musical shows. Gift from East Kazakhstan to the city.

fields.name: Шайхана (чайхана)
fields.description: Authentic medieval-spirit teahouse: Turkestan-style plov, shurpa, lagman. Samovar, divans.

fields.name: Туркестанский зоопарк
fields.description: Well-kept zoo near the historic center. Kazakhstan's local fauna.

fields.name: Городище Сыгнак
fields.description: Medieval capital of the Kazakh Khanate, 70km away. 14th–16th c. fortress ruins on the Syr Darya.

fields.name: Скальная тропа
fields.description: 1.5km trail along a cliff over the Caspian. 1000+ steps, views, sunset. Aktau's main landmark.

fields.name: Долина шаров Торыш
fields.description: Spherical concretions up to 4m, 120–180 million years. 150km from Aktau. Alien atmosphere.

fields.name: Бозжира (Клыки)
fields.description: Two white 200m+ peaks. Chalk castle-mountains. Kazakhstan's most photogenic landscape.

fields.name: Мечеть Бекет-Ата
fields.description: Underground 12th-c. cliff mosque — Mangystau's main shrine. 280km from Aktau — the journey is a meditation.

fields.name: Гора Шеркала
fields.description: 308m chalk mountain: one side a yurt, other a sleeping lion. 100km from Aktau.

fields.name: Набережная Актау
fields.description: Lighthouse on a residential roof, sculptures, skate park, cafes. Kazakhstan's best sea sunset.

fields.name: Голубая бухта
fields.description: Wild golden sand beach 30km away. 'Devil's Finger' cliff — a face visible in its outline.

fields.name: Впадина Карагие
fields.description: Eurasia's deepest depression — 132m below sea level. 50km. Salt flat — mirror in desert.

fields.name: Краеведческий музей им. Кекилбаева
fields.description: Mangystau history: Adai nomads, oil, paleontology. Diorama of ancient Caspian sea monsters.

fields.name: Форт Шевченко
fields.description: Historic fort. Taras Shevchenko in exile (1850–1857): drew local landscapes. Poet's museum.

fields.name: Подземная мечеть Шакпак-Ата
fields.description: Underground mosque 9th–11th c. — one of Kazakhstan's oldest. 4 halls, carved mihrabs.

fields.name: Плато Устюрт
fields.description: Vast plateau between the Caspian and Aral Sea. Martian landscapes, geoglyphs.

fields.name: Гора Отпан-Тау (532 м)
fields.description: Mangystau's highest point. Fires lit on summit to warn of danger. Geoglyphs: 'Archur', 'Centaur'.

fields.name: Каспийский морской тур
fields.description: Sea trip by catamaran/yacht. Fishing, sunsets, swimming. Caspian — world's largest lake.

fields.name: Ресторан «Каспий» (Актау)
fields.description: Aktau's best restaurant on the Caspian shore. Fresh fish: pike-perch, carp, sturgeon.

fields.name: Джип-тур по Мангыстау
fields.description: 3–5-day off-road tour: Bozzhira, Torysh, Beket-Ata, Sherkala, Karagiye. Kazakhstan's most epic tour.

fields.name: Кладбище Масат-Ата
fields.description: Necropolis 17th–19th c.: mausoleums with unique stone carving. Gravestones shaped as ships, yurts, weapons.

fields.name: Озеро Саура (Черепашье)
fields.description: Marsh turtles, flamingos, birdlife. 90km from Aktau. Nature at the edge of the desert.

fields.name: Маяк Актау (на крыше)
fields.description: Lighthouse on top of a residential high-rise — Aktau's symbol. Guides Caspian ships.

fields.name: Мечеть Султан-Епе
fields.description: Underground mosque 9th–11th c. Unique wall paintings, high halls, carved columns.

fields.name: Пляж Дубай (городской)
fields.description: Improved urban Caspian beach. Sunbeds, cafes, water slides, ATVs.

fields.name: Ресторан «Адай»
fields.description: Traditional Adai cuisine: beshbarmak from camel meat, shubat (camel milk). Unique flavor.

fields.name: Аквапарк Актау
fields.description: City's main waterpark: slides, pools, children's zones. True beach season lasts only 5 months.

fields.name: Нефтяная история Мангыстау
fields.description: Tour to oil facilities: pump jacks, rigs. Oil history since 1961.

fields.name: Озеро Боровое
fields.description: Resort's main lake: crystal clear water, pine-covered shores, rocky islands. Kazakhstan's Switzerland.

fields.name: Скала Жумбактас
fields.description: Enigma-rock: from different angles — a woman, owl, or warrior. Burabay's best Instagram shot.

fields.name: Гора Окжетпес
fields.description: 300m cliff 'Arrow Cannot Reach It'. Viewpoint over the entire Blue Bay. 30–40 min ascent.

fields.name: Пещера Кенесары
fields.description: Cave of Kazakhstan's last Khan Kenes Kasymov (1837–1847). 5km forest hiking trail.

fields.name: Гора Болектау (смотровая 147 м)
fields.description: 147m viewpoint: Blue Bay, Zhumbaktas, Okzhetpes, both lakes at once. Resort's best panorama.

fields.name: Поляна Абылай-Хана
fields.description: Sacred meadow: granite Khan's throne, 280th anniversary stela. Microclimate +3° — place of power.

fields.name: Озеро Щучье
fields.description: Deepest lake in the district (18m). Fishing, sailing. Clear water, pine forest.

fields.name: Казахстанская Лапландия
fields.description: Winter theme park: Father Frost, huskies, ice sculptures, slides. 30,000 visitors per season.

fields.name: Треккинг в Бурабае
fields.description: 5–15km pine forest trails. Squirrels, hares, moose. Bike rental, horse rides.

fields.name: Катамараны на Боровом
fields.description: Catamaran, rowboat, water bike rental. Trip to Zhumbaktas and rocks.

fields.name: Ресторан «Сосновый бор»
fields.description: In a pine forest: Kazakh cuisine, local lake trout, berry desserts. Terrace.

fields.name: Рыбалка в Бурабае
fields.description: Fishing in reserve lakes: pike, pike-perch, perch. License — 1500 KZT/day.

fields.name: Санаторий «Бурабай»
fields.description: Oldest sanatorium: pine air, medical procedures, pool, spa. Soviet history + modern comfort.

fields.name: Музей природы Бурабая
fields.description: Local history museum: flora and fauna, petroglyphs, nomad history. Terrarium for children.

fields.name: Конные прогулки по лесу
fields.description: Horse trails 1–3 hours. To Kenes cave, around the lake, up the mountain. All levels.

fields.name: Зимние лыжи Бурабая
fields.description: Ski slope and cross-country ski trails. Equipment rental, instructors. Accessible and charming.

fields.name: Ресторан «Форель» (поймай сам)
fields.description: Catch-your-own restaurant: catch in the pond → they cook it. Trout, carp, pike.

fields.name: Купание и пляж Боровое
fields.description: Town beach: clean freshwater, sand, sunbeds. SUP rental. June–August.

fields.name: Скалодром Бурабая
fields.description: Climbing wall in a pine forest: routes of varying difficulty, gear rental, instructors.

fields.name: Базар «Береке»
fields.description: Local market: sea-buckthorn juice, smoked fish, crayfish, Kokshetau ice cream, honey, wild berries.

fields.name: Мавзолей Айша-Биби
fields.description: Masterpiece 11th–12th c.: terracotta carving of 60 patterns, none repeated. Story of tragic love. UNESCO.

fields.name: Мавзолей Карахана
fields.description: Tomb of ruler Karakhan-ata, 11th c. One of Kazakhstan's oldest architectural monuments.

fields.name: Мавзолей Давут-Бека
fields.description: 18th century mausoleum with surviving decor. Pilgrimage site.

fields.name: Краеведческий музей Тараза
fields.description: History from antiquity: Silk Road, Kazakh khanates. 30,000 exhibits.

fields.name: Развалины античного Тараза
fields.description: Taraz — one of Central Asia's oldest cities (2000+ years). Medieval city ruins beneath the modern one.

fields.name: Ущелье Тектурмас
fields.description: Picturesque gorge with a river 15km away. Picnic areas, fishing, camping.

fields.name: Мечеть Тектурмас
fields.description: Historic mosque on Tektyrmas mountain — place of power. Taraz panorama.

fields.name: Ресторан «Жамбыл»
fields.description: Taraz's best restaurant: Kazakh and Uzbek cuisine, wood-fired plov, shashlik.

fields.name: Городской парк Тараза
fields.description: City's main park: fountains, rides, Ferris wheel, cafes.

fields.name: Мавзолей Бабаджи-Хатун
fields.description: 10th–11th century mausoleum — one of Kazakhstan's oldest. Fired brick dome. Next to Aisha-Bibi.

fields.name: Торговый рынок Тараза
fields.description: Main market: produce, clothing, Kazakh sweets, apricots, raisins. Southern bazaar atmosphere.

fields.name: Плов по-таразски
fields.description: Famous plov: lamb, rice, carrots, raisins. Made from early morning — sold out in 3 hours. Queue from 8am.

fields.name: Площадь Абая Тараза
fields.description: City's main square: fountains, Zhambyl-akyn monument. Evening shows. City events.

fields.name: Мавзолей Тектурмас
fields.description: Medieval 14th-century mausoleum at Tektyrmas mountain. Pilgrimage. Valley view.

fields.name: Каньон Акчулак
fields.description: Little-known canyon with red cliffs 50km away. Terracotta and ochre colors.

fields.name: Жамбылский зоопарк
fields.description: City zoo: local animals, birds. For families with children.

fields.name: Городской бассейн
fields.description: Olympic pool: swimming lessons, children's sections.

fields.name: Перевал Кордай (дорожное кафе)
fields.description: Kordai pass on Taraz–Almaty highway: Kazakh roadside restaurants, ayran, baursak, et.

fields.name: Тюркское святилище Мерке
fields.description: Sanctuary 60km away: petroglyphs, sacred stones, atmosphere of millennia. Rarely visited.

fields.name: История переименований Тараза
fields.description: Taraz = Auliye-Ata = Mirzoyan = Dzhambul — tour of toponymic history and Soviet architecture.

fields.name: Дом-музей Достоевского
fields.description: House where Dostoyevsky lived in exile (1854–1859). 'Uncle's Dream' written here. Authentic 19th-century interior.

fields.name: Музей Абая Кунанбаева
fields.description: Main museum of great Kazakh poet Abai (1845–1904). Manuscripts, personal items, poem history.

fields.name: Мемориал «Stronger Than Death»
fields.description: Nuclear test site (1949–1989): 456 tests. Unique museum, artifacts, eyewitness accounts. Place of grief.

fields.name: Мечеть Абылай-Хана (историческая)
fields.description: 18th-century historic mosque — one of Kazakhstan's oldest. Wooden architecture.

fields.name: Набережная Иртыша
fields.description: Beautiful promenade of the great Irtysh. Historic center, walks, evening lighting.

fields.name: Областной краеведческий музей
fields.description: Nature, history, ethnography. Collection of Abai's and Dostoyevsky's items.

fields.name: Мечеть им. Абая (современная)
fields.description: Modern mosque honoring Abai. Beautiful architecture, capacity 3000.

fields.name: Ресторан «Иртыш»
fields.description: City's best: Kazakh and Russian cuisine, Irtysh fish — pike-perch, sturgeon. River view.

fields.name: Иртышская рыбалка
fields.description: Fishing: pike-perch, pike, sterlet, carp. Boat and tackle rental.

fields.name: Памятник Абаю
fields.description: Monumental statue in city center. Meeting spot and main photo point.

fields.name: Дом Шакарима
fields.description: Memory of poet Shakarim — Abai's student, shot in 1931. House museum, history of repressions.

fields.name: Театр им. Абая (Семей)
fields.description: Region's main theater: Kazakh and Russian drama. Productions about Abai and Dostoyevsky.

fields.name: Городской парк Семея
fields.description: City's main park on the Irtysh: rides, promenade, summer cafes.

fields.name: Зоопарк Семея
fields.description: Small zoo on the Irtysh bank. Local animals, Kazakhstan birds.

fields.name: Кафе «Чашка чая»
fields.description: Cozy cafe: Kazakh desserts, tea, sweet samsa. Semiey's city life.

fields.name: ТЦ Номад (Семей)
fields.description: Semiey's main mall: clothing, electronics, cafes. Central meeting spot.

fields.name: Музей истории Семипалатинска
fields.description: History of merchant city, exiles, nuclear era, modernity. 300 years in artifacts.

fields.name: Парк ядерного разоружения
fields.description: Nevada-Semipalatinsk: story of Kazakhs' struggle for a nuclear-free world. Memorial complex.

fields.name: Каркаралинский нац. парк
fields.description: Granite mountains amid the steppe — 'Kazakhstan's Urals'. Pines, lakes, caves. Bears, lynxes, eagles.

fields.name: Озеро Шайтанколь
fields.description: 'Devil's Lake' in granite mountains — dark blue. Dragon legend. Rock reflections.

fields.name: Пещера Конур-Аулие
fields.description: Large cave — pilgrimage site. Stalactites, underground halls. Mysticism and nature.

fields.name: Гора Кент (1403 м)
fields.description: Park's main peak. 5–6h hike. 360° panorama — mountains visible 100km away.

fields.name: Сосновый реликтовый лес
fields.description: Relict pine forest in the steppe — rarest biome. Phytoncides, healing. Walks.

fields.name: Озеро Карасор (фламинго)
fields.description: Steppe lake with pink flamingos and migratory birds. 50km from Karkaraly.

fields.name: Петроглифы Танбалытас
fields.description: Bronze and Iron Age rock carvings in the park. Thousands of years of history on stone.

fields.name: Краеведческий музей Каркаралинска
fields.description: History: 19th-c. fair (largest in CA), nomads, park nature. Cozy small museum.

fields.name: Гора Акбет
fields.description: Park's second highest mountain. 3–4h trekking. Eagles, open rocks, views.

fields.name: Кемпинг под звёздами
fields.description: Camping in the park. Zero light pollution — Milky Way. Tents, bonfire, silence.

fields.name: Конные туры «Каркаралы»
fields.description: Multi-day horse routes: sleeping under the stars, nomadic experience. 2–5 days.

fields.name: Рыбалка в горных озёрах
fields.description: Trout, perch, crucian carp in pristine mountain lakes. Almost no tourists.

fields.name: Пикниковые поляны парка
fields.description: Official picnic zones: BBQ grills, pavilions. Karaganda residents' favorite spot.

fields.name: Охота с беркутом
fields.description: Traditional Kazakh falconry with golden eagle — living heritage. Local berkutchi.

fields.name: Музей степи (этнографический)
fields.description: Ethno-park: real yurts, nomadic objects, Kazakh cuisine. Steppe life of the 19th century.

fields.name: Ресторан «Каркаралы»
fields.description: Park's only decent restaurant: shashlik, kuyrdak, baursak. Hunting lodge atmosphere.

fields.name: Горячие источники
fields.description: Thermal springs 30km away. Bathing in the steppe. Little-known — almost no tourists.

fields.name: Мечеть XIX в. Каркаралинска
fields.description: 19th-century historic mosque — architectural monument in city center.

fields.name: Гагаринский старт (Старт-1)
fields.description: Launch pad No.1 — Gagarin lifted off here on April 12, 1961. 600 launches. Sacred place.

fields.name: Наблюдение за запуском «Союза»
fields.description: Live event: actual Soyuz launch. Countdown, fire, roar, rocket goes to space. Unforgettable.

fields.name: Музей истории космодрома
fields.description: History since 1954: Sputnik, Gagarin, Tereshkova, Buran, ISS. Genuine artifacts.

fields.name: Домик Гагарина
fields.description: Memorial cottage: night before the flight. Authentic furnishings. Time stopped in April 1961.

fields.name: Домик Королёва
fields.description: Memorial home of chief designer Sergei Korolev. Study, bedroom, personal items.

fields.name: Макет ракеты «Союз» в городе
fields.description: Full-scale Soyuz model in city center. Symbol of Baikonur. Essential photo.

fields.name: МИК (сборочный цех ракет)
fields.description: Rocket assembly shop: you see a rocket on the stand before rollout. The scale is staggering.

fields.name: Вывоз ракеты на стартовый стол
fields.description: Spectacle: rocket transported by rail 7km in 3 hours. Slow, solemn, majestic.

fields.name: Аэродром «Юбилейный»
fields.description: Historic airfield: cosmonauts' planes land here. 'Buran' launched from here.

fields.name: Буран на стоянке
fields.description: Soviet 'Buran' — the only Soviet shuttle that flew to space. On permanent display.

fields.name: Международная космическая школа
fields.description: Educational center: ISS simulators, weightlessness, Baikonur history. Interactive.

fields.name: Ресторан «Союз» (Байконур)
fields.description: City's main restaurant: Russian and Kazakh cuisine, dishes named after rockets and cosmonauts.

fields.name: Памятник Ю. Гагарину
fields.description: Monumental statue of Earth's first cosmonaut. Place of veneration.

fields.name: Степь вокруг Байконура (сайгаки)
fields.description: Wild Kazakh steppe: saiga antelopes, steppe eagles, sunrises. Contrast of technology and nature.

fields.name: Экскурсия по городу Байконур
fields.description: Closed city: Soviet architecture, cosmonaut-named streets. Unique Russian enclave in Kazakhstan.

fields.name: Мост «Европа–Азия»
fields.description: Main landmark: bridge over the Ural literally divides Europe and Asia. Stand on two continents.

fields.name: Набережная р. Урал
fields.description: Pedestrian Ural River promenade: Europe/Asia in one city. Evening walks with ships.

fields.name: Краеведческий музей Атырау
fields.description: Region history: oil history, Adai Kazakh clan, Caspian nature.

fields.name: Центральная мечеть Атырау
fields.description: White mosque with 57m minarets. A gift from an oil company to the city.

fields.name: Ресторан «Каспий» (Атырау)
fields.description: Fish restaurant: sturgeon, beluga, carp, pike-perch from the Caspian. Freshest seafood.

fields.name: Рыбалка на осётра
fields.description: Licensed fishing: sturgeon, beluga (up to 100+ kg!), carp. Unique experience.

fields.name: Нефтяной музей Атырау
fields.description: Oil extraction history: first well 1899, Soviet era, Tengiz, modernity.

fields.name: Городской парк Атырау
fields.description: Main park: fountains, alleys, rides. On the Ural bank.

fields.name: ТЦ Жайлы (Атырау)
fields.description: Main mall: branded clothing, electronics, restaurants. Center of life in the oil city.

fields.name: Атырауский театр
fields.description: Kazakh musical-drama theater. National productions.

fields.name: Пляж р. Урал
fields.description: City beach: swimming in the Europe/Asia border river. Clean fresh water.

fields.name: Заповедник «Устюрт» Атырауский
fields.description: Northern Ustyurt plateau: rocky cliffs, wild animals, rare birds. Jeep tours.

fields.name: Ресторан «Нурсая»
fields.description: Popular Kazakh cuisine restaurant with live music. Beshbarmak, kuyrdak. Oilmen's meetings.

fields.name: Каспийский берег (70 км от Атырау)
fields.description: Caspian shore: beach, fishing, wild nature. Sturgeon and beluga — local delicacies.

fields.name: Тенгиз (нефтяное месторождение)
fields.description: One of the world's largest oil fields. Tour for corporate guests. Engineering wonder in the steppe.

fields.name: Набережная Иртыша (Павлодар)
fields.description: 4km along the great Irtysh. Fountains, sculptures, cycling paths. North Kazakhstan's best promenade.

fields.name: Мечеть Машхур-Жусупа
fields.description: North Kazakhstan's largest mosque: 2000 seats, 4 minarets 57m, white marble.

fields.name: Баянаульский нац. парк
fields.description: Granite mountains in the steppe, 100km. Lakes Zhasybay and Sabyndykol. Beach, trekking, fishing.

fields.name: Озеро Жасыбай
fields.description: Bayanaul's most beautiful lake: clean, mountain, with a sandy beach by granite cliffs.

fields.name: Краеведческий музей им. Потанина
fields.description: Irtysh region history: nature, nomads, petrochemistry. 40,000 exhibits.

fields.name: Областной художественный музей
fields.description: North Kazakhstan's most significant art museum: Russian and Kazakh painting 19th–21st centuries.

fields.name: Мемориал Машхур-Жусупа
fields.description: Memorial of poet-prophet Mashhur-Zhusup Kopeyev — Kazakh prophet and thinker of the 19th century.

fields.name: Иртышская рыбалка (Павлодар)
fields.description: Irtysh fishing: pike, pike-perch, burbot, sterlet. Boat and tackle rental.

fields.name: Городской парк Павлодара
fields.description: City's main park: rides, promenade, summer cafes. Family relaxation.

fields.name: Пещера Дюйсенбая
fields.description: Cave in Bayanaul's granite mountains. Narrow passages, underground halls.

fields.name: Ресторан «Иртыш» (Павлодар)
fields.description: Best restaurant: Kazakh and Russian cuisine, Irtysh fish. River view.

fields.name: Набережная + фонтаны Павлодара
fields.description: Evening fountain shows on the promenade. Light installations, city life.

fields.name: ТЦ Сарыарка (Павлодар)
fields.description: Pavlodar's largest mall: shops, cinema, cafes. Central spot.

fields.name: Мечеть «Машхур-Жусуп» мемориал
fields.description: Memorial complex at the mosque: history of the poet-prophet, his prophecies about Kazakhstan.

fields.name: Баянаул: пляжный отдых
fields.description: Mountain beach 100km from Pavlodar: mountain lake, clean air, granite. Best summer relaxation.

fields.name: Ресторан Meze
fields.description: Almaty's best Mediterranean restaurant: hummus, falafel, grill. Live music, warm atmosphere. Popular with locals.

fields.name: Noni Restaurant
fields.description: Trendy all-day restaurant: breakfasts, business lunches, evening DJ sets. Top of RestoLife 2024.

fields.name: Almaty Photography Walk
fields.description: Photo walk through Almaty's old courtyards: Soviet mosaics, graffiti, apple orchards, authentic alleys.

fields.name: Балхаш-тур из Алматы
fields.description: Lake Balkhash — unique two-color lake (fresh/salt), fishing, wild beach. 400km from Almaty.

fields.name: Ресторан Duman
fields.description: Restaurant on the Esil riverbank with panoramic windows. Kazakh and Eastern cuisine. Duman aquarium nearby.

fields.name: Набережная Иртыша (УК)
fields.description: Scenic promenade at the confluence of the Irtysh and Ulba rivers. Bridges, sculptures, cafes.

fields.name: Катунский хребет (базовый лагерь)
fields.description: Ascent to Belukha (4506m) — highest peak of Siberia and Kazakhstan. Base camp from UKhN. For experienced climbers.

fields.name: Рахмановские ключи
fields.description: High-altitude resort with radon thermal springs (1700m). Therapeutic baths, mountain air, Altai.

fields.name: Озеро Маркаколь
fields.description: Kazakhstan's largest mountain lake (6,000 km²) in a reserve. Pristine water, relict nature, grayling fish.

fields.name: Зыряновск (горнолыжный)
fields.description: Ski resort near Zyryanovsk: runs, lifts, Altai mountain landscapes. Less known than Chimbulak — fewer crowds.

fields.name: Областной краеведческий музей ВКО
fields.description: East Kazakhstan region main museum: Altai nature, Cossack and Kazakh history, mining industry. 40,000 exhibits.

fields.name: Усть-Каменогорская ГЭС
fields.description: Kazakhstan's largest hydroelectric station on the Irtysh (1953). Tourist tours — Soviet engineering scale is staggering.

fields.name: Алтайский ботанический сад
fields.description: One of Kazakhstan's oldest botanical gardens: rare Altai plants, tulips, rock garden. Quiet walking spot.

fields.name: Ресторан «Алтай»
fields.description: Best UKhN restaurant: Kazakh cuisine, Irtysh fish, Altai dishes. Live music on weekends.

fields.name: Парк Кирова (УК)
fields.description: City's main park: rides, winter ice rink, Ferris wheel, cafes. Family relaxation.

fields.name: Трекинг по Алтаю
fields.description: Hiking routes through Kazakhstan Altai: passes, glaciers, mountain lakes. 3–10 day tours from UKhN.

fields.name: Пещера Коныр-Аулие (ВКО)
fields.description: Underground cliff mosque — pilgrimage site for East Kazakhstan Muslims. Beautiful stalactites, sacred spring.

fields.name: Риддер (горнолыжный курорт)
fields.description: Ridder ski resort (former Leninogorsk): Altai mountains, excellent snow, runs for all levels. 70km from UKhN.

fields.name: Теректинский хребет (конные туры)
fields.description: Horse tours through the Terektinsky Range of Altai: alpine meadows, pristine nature, yurt overnights.

fields.name: Краеведческий музей Риддера
fields.description: Mining city museum: 18th-century silver and zinc mine history, Cossack history, Altai nature.

fields.name: Бурабай (из Кокшетау)
fields.description: 80km to Kazakhstan's Switzerland. Kokshetau is the perfect base for day trips to Burabay.

fields.name: Голубой залив (Кокшетау)
fields.description: Picturesque blue bay of Lake Kopa within the city. Promenade, ducks, quiet walks.

fields.name: Областной историко-краеведческий музей
fields.description: Akmola region history: Burabay nature, steppe nomads, Soviet era, modernity.

fields.name: Мечеть «Нур Астана» (Кокшетау)
fields.description: Kokshetau's main mosque. Contemporary Islamic design, capacity 1500.

fields.name: Парк «Жастар» Кокшетау
fields.description: City's main park on Lake Kopa: rides, cycling paths, summer cafes. Relaxation by the water.

fields.name: Ресторан «Кокшетау»
fields.description: City's best restaurant: Kazakh cuisine, fish from Kopa, beshbarmak. Family events.

fields.name: Гора Кокше (1009 м)
fields.description: North Kazakhstan's highest point. 3h hike, steppe and Burabay panorama. Sacred Kazakh mountain.

fields.name: Музей Коркыта-ата
fields.description: Museum of legendary Kazakh musician Korkyt — inventor of the kobyz instrument. Nomadic music history.

fields.name: Озеро Копа (рыбалка)
fields.description: Fishing in city Lake Kopa: crucian carp, pike, bream. Boat rental. Locals' favorite spot.

fields.name: Казахский театр Кокшетау
fields.description: Kazakh musical-drama theater: national productions, folk plays. Cultural center of the north.

fields.name: Торговый центр «Ак Ерке»
fields.description: Kokshetau's main mall: clothing, shoes, electronics, restaurants. City's central meeting spot.

fields.name: Коргалжын — фламинго (из Кокшетау)
fields.description: Korgalzhyn reserve 100km away: pink flamingos — world's largest nesting colony. UNESCO site.

fields.name: Набережная Ишима (Петропавловск)
fields.description: Ishim River promenade in Kazakhstan's northernmost regional center. Walks, bridges, evening lighting.

fields.name: Областной северо-казахстанский музей
fields.description: North Kazakhstan history: Siberian Cossacks, Kazakh steppes, Soviet era. Unique artifacts.

fields.name: Мечеть Кызылжар
fields.description: North Kazakhstan's main mosque. White building with blue dome, capacity 2000.

fields.name: Собор Петра и Павла
fields.description: 19th-century Orthodox cathedral — architectural monument. Gave the city its name. White with green domes.

fields.name: Набережная (Зона отдыха СКО)
fields.description: Recreation zone on the Ishim bank: beach in summer, ice rink in winter, rides, cafes.

fields.name: Ресторан «Ишим»
fields.description: City's best restaurant: Kazakh and Russian cuisine, Ishim river fish. River view.

fields.name: Парк культуры и отдыха
fields.description: Main park: Ferris wheel, rides, winter ice rink. Family relaxation in the center.

fields.name: Казахский театр (СКО)
fields.description: Kazakh musical-drama theater: Kazakh-language repertoire, classics and contemporary productions.

fields.name: Русский театр (СКО)
fields.description: Russian drama theater — one of Kazakhstan's oldest. World drama classics.

fields.name: ТЦ «Глобус» (Петропавловск)
fields.description: SKO's main shopping center: stores, cinema, cafes. City's central spot.

fields.name: Памятник Абаю (Петропавловск)
fields.description: Monumental statue of great Kazakh poet Abai in the city center. Meeting spot.

fields.name: Ишимская рыбалка
fields.description: Fishing on the Ishim River: crucian carp, bream, pike, pike-perch. Peaceful fishing in northern landscapes.

fields.name: Сакральный Улытау
fields.description: Ulytau mountains — spiritual heart of the Kazakh people. Khan kurultais held here, Timur's stele (1391).

fields.name: Мавзолей Алаша-хана
fields.description: 11th–12th c. mausoleum — burial place of legendary Khan Alasha, founder of the Kazakh people. Pilgrimage site.

fields.name: Городище Сыгнак (Жезказган)
fields.description: Medieval Baskamyr settlement — Silk Road trading center in the steppe. Excavations yielded unique artifacts.

fields.name: Музей меди и металлургии
fields.description: History of Zhezkazgan — world's largest copper deposit (from 3rd millennium BC!). Copper civilization of the steppe.

fields.name: Мавзолей Домбауыл
fields.description: 8th–9th century mausoleum — one of Kazakhstan's oldest. Burial place of legendary batyr.

fields.name: Кенотаф Едиге
fields.description: Monument to legendary ruler Edigei (14th–15th c.) — one of the founders of the Nogai Horde. Sacred place.

fields.name: Озеро Теликоль
fields.description: Steppe lake with flamingos and diverse birdlife 30km from Zhezkazgan. Quiet wild nature.

fields.name: Ресторан «Степной»
fields.description: Zhezkazgan's best restaurant: Kazakh cuisine, steppe dishes, homemade beshbarmak. Cozy and delicious.

fields.name: Парк металлургов
fields.description: Zhezkazgan's main park: metallurgists monument, fountains, alleys. History of the copper city.

fields.name: Джезказганский медный комбинат (тур)
fields.description: Tour of one of the world's largest copper plants. Industrial tourism — the scale is staggering.

fields.name: Мавзолей Коркыт-ата
fields.description: Memorial complex of legendary musician Korkyt-ata — inventor of the kobyz. Unique architectural ensemble on the Syr Darya.

fields.name: Байконур — тур из Кызылорды
fields.description: Kyzylorda — main transit point for Baikonur tours. Transfer to cosmodrome (80km). Organized tours.

fields.name: Сырдарья — рыбалка
fields.description: Fishing on the great Syr Darya river: catfish, carp, asp. Wild tugai forest nature on the banks.

fields.name: Городище Жент
fields.description: Medieval Silk Road settlement (10th–13th c.). Excavations reveal a trading center of ancient Kazakhstan.

fields.name: Арал: трагедия моря
fields.description: Aral Sea — one of the world's greatest ecological disasters. Ships in the desert, former port of Aralsk. Unique.

fields.name: Кызылординский историко-краеведческий музей
fields.description: Kyzylorda region history: Syr Darya, Silk Road, nomads, Soviet cotton.

fields.name: Мечеть Коркыт-ата (г. Кызылорда)
fields.description: Kyzylorda's main mosque, named after Korkyt-ata. Beautiful architecture, capacity 3000.

fields.name: Ресторан «Сырдарья»
fields.description: Kyzylorda's best restaurant: Kazakh cuisine, plov, beshbarmak, Syr Darya fish. River view.

fields.name: Парк им. Абая (Кызылорда)
fields.description: Kyzylorda's main park on the Syr Darya bank. Fountains, rides, summer cafes.

fields.name: Мавзолей Укаша-ата (Кызылорда)
fields.description: Mausoleum of the Prophet's companion. Pilgrimage from all of Kazakhstan. Sacred well.

fields.name: Озеро Балхаш (уникальное двухцветное)
fields.description: 18th largest lake in the world — unique: western part is freshwater, eastern part is saltwater. Border runs through the water.

fields.name: Балхашский пляж
fields.description: Balkhash beach season: water heats to +28°C, golden sand, wild shores. Sea alternative without a passport.

fields.name: Рыбалка на Балхаше
fields.description: Balkhash — fishing paradise: carp, pike-perch, perch, bream. Licensed fishing, boat rental.

fields.name: Балхашский медеплавильный завод (тур)
fields.description: One of the largest copper smelters in the USSR and CIS. Industrial tourism — Soviet industry scale.

fields.name: Краеведческий музей Балхаша
fields.description: City and Lake Balkhash history: nature, fishing, copper mining, Central Kazakhstan nomads.

fields.name: Балхашский ботанический сад
fields.description: Small botanical garden on the Balkhash shore: arid climate plants, tamarisk, zhuzgun. Silence by the lake.

fields.name: Парк «Победа» (Балхаш)
fields.description: Balkhash's main park on the lake shore. Evening walks, fountains, children's rides.

fields.name: Мечеть Балхаша
fields.description: Balkhash's main mosque. Contemporary architecture, capacity 1000.

fields.name: Ресторан «Балхаш»
fields.description: Main restaurant: Kazakh cuisine, Balkhash fish — carp, pike-perch, bream. Lake view.

fields.name: Каттыкорган (водохранилище)
fields.description: Kattykurgan reservoir — ideal for windsurfing, kitesurfing, yachting on Balkhash.

fields.name: Долина Замков
fields.description: Main attraction of Charyn Canyon: bizarre red rocks resemble towers and castles. 2km walk along the floor.

fields.name: Реликтовая ясеневая роща
fields.description: World's only grove of Sogdian ash — survived the Ice Age (25 million years!). In the Charyn river floodplain.

fields.name: Каньон Темирлик
fields.description: Little-known canyon at the confluence of Charyn and Temirlik. Dark rocks, narrow gorges, almost no tourists.

fields.name: Лагерь в каньоне (глэмпинг)
fields.description: Overnight stay right at the bottom of the Valley of Castles. Starry sky over red cliffs — one of Kazakhstan's best experiences.

fields.name: Смотровая площадка каньона
fields.description: Viewpoint at the top of the canyon overlooking the entire Valley of Castles from above. Best sunset shot.

fields.name: Конная прогулка по каньону
fields.description: Horse riding through the bottom of Charyn Canyon. 2–3 hours among red cliffs on horseback — cinematic feeling.

fields.name: Река Чарын (рафтинг)
fields.description: Rafting on the Charyn mountain river through the canyon. Rapids, splashes, red walls all around. Unforgettable.

fields.name: Фотосессия в каньоне
fields.description: Professional photo sessions in the Valley of Castles: weddings, portraits, fashion. Unique red backdrop.

fields.name: Флора и фауна заповедника
fields.description: 100 bird species, 62 mammal species, 25 reptile species. Fox, wolf, argali, badger — all in Charyn.

fields.name: Черный каньон Чарына
fields.description: Little-known dark basalt canyon next to the Valley of Castles. Geological wonder — completely different color palette.

fields.name: Кемпинг Чарын (официальный)
fields.description: Official campsite in the national park: tent spots, toilets, BBQ zones. Stars without light pollution.

fields.name: Экскурсия к Долине Замков (из Алматы)
fields.description: Day tour from Almaty: 4h drive, 2h in canyon, return. Most popular tour from Almaty.

fields.name: Закат в каньоне
fields.description: Sunset in the Valley of Castles paints the red rocks in even brighter hues. Golden hour — most beautiful moment.

fields.name: Рассвет в каньоне
fields.description: Sunrise in the Valley of Castles: mist over the river, pink light on the cliffs, complete silence. Magic.

fields.name: Экотропа Чарына
fields.description: Marked 8km eco-trail along the canyon floor: information boards about geology, flora, fauna.

fields.name: Кольсай-1 (нижнее озеро)
fields.description: First and most accessible lake at 1818m. Clear turquoise water, pine-spruce forest, resort nearby.

fields.name: Кольсай-2 (среднее озеро)
fields.description: Middle lake at 2252m — the most beautiful. 3h hike from Kolsay-1. Mountain reflections in perfect water mirror.

fields.name: Кольсай-3 (верхнее озеро)
fields.description: Upper lake at 2850m — for prepared hikers. 5–6h hike from Kolsay-1. Alpine nature, almost no tourists.

fields.name: Конный тур Кольсай–Каинды
fields.description: Multi-day horse route Kolsay → pass → Lake Kaindy. 2–3 days with mountain overnight. Epic.

fields.name: Озеро Каинды
fields.description: Submerged spruce forest stands right in the lake — one of Kazakhstan's most unusual places. Near Kolsay.

fields.name: Треккинг через перевал (Кольсай)
fields.description: Trekking over a 3000m pass: Kolsay → Kaindy on foot. 8–10 hours. Alpine meadows, glaciers, wild nature.

fields.name: Рыбалка на Кольсае
fields.description: Trout and grayling in crystal clear mountain lakes. Licensed fishing. Angler's paradise in the mountains.

fields.name: Юрточный лагерь Кольсай
fields.description: Authentic yurt camp at Kolsay-1: Kazakh lifestyle, home cooking, horse rides. Immerse in culture.

fields.name: Водопад Кольсай
fields.description: Cascade of waterfalls between Kolsay-1 and Kolsay-2 along the trail. Roar of water, spray, fresh mountain air.

fields.name: Фотография на Кольсае
fields.description: Kolsay — top-3 photo locations of Kazakhstan. Turquoise water, spruce shores, mountain reflections. Season: Jul–Aug.

fields.name: Треккинг Кольсай-1 → Кольсай-2
fields.description: Kolsay's most popular trail: 8km round trip, 450m elevation, 3–4 hours. For all fitness levels.

fields.name: Нац. парк Колсай Көлдері — КПП
fields.description: National park visitor center: information, maps, briefing. Entrance — 1500 KZT. Staff will help with route.

fields.name: Горы Актау (разноцветные)
fields.description: Chalk mountains with striped slopes — white, red, yellow, green. Geological rainbow. Unique in the world.

fields.name: Петроглифы Тамгалы-Тас
fields.description: Rock carvings 15th–17th c. by the Ili River: Tibetan Buddhist motifs — unique monument in steppe Kazakhstan.

fields.name: Стада сайгаков
fields.description: Altyn-Emel — Kazakhstan's largest saiga reserve. In spring, herds of up to 3000 move through the park.

fields.name: Джунгарские ворота
fields.description: Pass-gorge between mountain ranges — historical route of nomads and conquerors. Powerful winds.

fields.name: Степные орлы и птицы парка
fields.description: Altyn-Emel — birdwatching paradise: steppe eagles, golden eagles, bustards, pheasants, cranes. 260+ bird species.

fields.name: Сакские курганы Бесшатыр
fields.description: Group of 31 Saka burial mounds, 5th–3rd c. BC. Largest are 10m high and 100m in diameter. Place of power.

fields.name: Джип-тур по Алтын-Эмелю
fields.description: 2–3 day jeep tour of the park: Dune, Aktau, petroglyphs, saiga, overnight in steppe under stars.

fields.name: Ночёвка в степи (Алтын-Эмель)
fields.description: Camping in steppe against the colorful Aktau mountains. Absolute silence, Milky Way, scent of wormwood.

fields.name: Посещение визит-центра Алтын-Эмель
fields.description: Park visitor center: history, maps, photos, route information. Pre-registration required.

fields.name: Фото на Поющем Бархане
fields.description: Singing Dune — Kazakhstan's top-1 photo location by uniqueness. Sunset from the summit: steppe, mountains, solitude.

fields.name: Восхождение на Бархан
fields.description: Climb the 150m Singing Dune through loose sand. Hard going, but at the top — 360° panorama of steppe and mountains.

fields.name: Лошади Пржевальского
fields.description: Altyn-Emel — one of few places to see wild Przewalski's horses. Reintroduction since the 1990s.

fields.name: Подземная мечеть Бекет-Ата (тур из Актау)
fields.description: 3-day tour to the main shrine: Beket-Ata, Shakpak-Ata, Sultan-Epe, necropolises. Spiritual journey.

fields.name: Некрополь Кызылкуп
fields.description: Ancient necropolis with unique gravestones shaped as yurts and ships. Stone carving — Adai people's art.

fields.name: Меловые горы Акмая
fields.description: Snow-white chalk mountains by the Caspian. Fantastic erosion shapes, grottos, arches. A filming location.

fields.name: Пещера Таскора
fields.description: Giant cave in chalk mountains. Natural amphitheater with acoustics. Place of power — ancient rock signs.

fields.name: Плато Актолагай
fields.description: Chalk plateau with 100m vertical cliffs — 'Mangystau Table Mountain'. Steppe panorama from the cliff.

fields.name: Сор Тузбаир
fields.description: Endless white salt flat — Kazakhstan's Bolivia. Perfect mirror when wet. Alien-like photos.

fields.name: Пещерный город Шаир
fields.description: Medieval underground city in chalk rock — living rooms, water pipes, mosque. Archaeologists' mystery.

fields.name: Геологический разрез Меловых гор
fields.description: Rock exposures from Cretaceous to Neogene: 70 million years of geological history on one wall.

fields.name: Верблюдоводческая ферма
fields.description: Traditional Adai camel herding. Shubat (fresh), observing camels, national dishes.

fields.name: Каспийский закат (лучшие точки)
fields.description: Sunset over the Caspian Sea — one of Kazakhstan's most beautiful. Top spots: Embankment, Cliff Trail, cape.

fields.name: Мыс Меловой (Актау)
fields.description: White chalk cape jutting into the Caspian Sea. Wild beach, crystal clear water. No tourists.

fields.name: Горы Мангышлак (хребет)
fields.description: Mangyshlak Karatau ridge: hiking trails, rocky terrain, Caspian and steppe panorama. 300–500m altitude.

fields.name: Кемпинг в пустыне Мангыстау
fields.description: Desert overnight under the starry sky: total darkness, silence, Milky Way in full width. Unforgettable.

fields.name: Дегустация верблюжьего молока
fields.description: Shubat — fermented camel milk drink. Health, traditions, unique taste. Sold roadside.

fields.name: Мангыстау с воздуха (дрон-тур)
fields.description: Aerial photography of Bozzhira, Torysh, Ustyurt plateau by drone. Landscapes look like another planet. For pros.

fields.name: Fika Café
fields.description: Almaty's most aesthetic café 2024 — featured in Wallpaper*. Swedish fika concept: coffee + cakes + summer terrace. Studio NAAW design in 1930s TurkSib building.

fields.name: Abr Coffee
fields.description: Almaty's top specialty coffee roaster — multiple locations. Own roast, pour-overs, espresso, minimalist design.

fields.name: Spectre Coffee
fields.description: Specialty coffee shop with own roasting. One of the city's best espresso. Small, quiet, for true coffee lovers.

fields.name: Holder Coffee
fields.description: Trendy specialty coffee shop: signature drinks, beautiful interior, good food. Popular among young crowd.

fields.name: Flask Coffee
fields.description: Specialty coffee + brunch spot. Chicken Star brunch — cult dish. Cozy atmosphere, great food with coffee.

fields.name: Vanilla Coffee Shop
fields.description: Top café for meetups and work. Almaty youth's most popular spot: lively atmosphere, good coffee. Multiple locations.

fields.name: Penka Almaty
fields.description: Aesthetic café with beautiful interior — perfect for Instagram. Aromatic coffee, desserts, cozy atmosphere.

fields.name: Six Coffee & Wine
fields.description: Coffee shop + wine bar in one: specialty coffee by day, wine by evening. Unusual menu, stylish spacious interior.

fields.name: Daily Coffee
fields.description: Large coffee chain: 10+ locations across Almaty, open till 2am. Breakfasts, bowls, coffee — everyday staple.

fields.name: Lova Coffee
fields.description: Cozy downtown café: beautiful interior, good coffee, pleasant vibe. Popular with locals.

fields.name: Traveler's Coffee Алматы
fields.description: Classic chain: 11 branches across the city, open till midnight. Business meetings, all-day breakfasts, comfy sofas, Wi-Fi.

fields.name: Eva Coffee House
fields.description: Kazakh specialty coffee: 'Making Kazakh cool'. Breakfasts from 7am, open till 2am. Two locations.

fields.name: Bowler Coffee Roasters
fields.description: Specialty roastery at Kokbazar. One of the city's best pour-over. Small, authentic coffee nerd spot.

fields.name: Tselinny Center
fields.description: Central Asia's top cultural sensation 2025: first independent contemporary art center in a reconstructed 1964 Soviet cinema. Design by Asif Khan. 12,000 visitors in first 3 days.

fields.name: Almaty Museum of Arts
fields.description: Kazakhstan's first private art museum, opened September 2025. 700+ works by Kazakh, Central Asian and international artists.

fields.name: Золотой квадрат (прогулочный маршрут)
fields.description: Almaty's main hangout district: between Dosyk/Seifullin/Abay/Al-Farabi. Coffee shops, restaurants, galleries, Tselinny, summer terraces, boutiques.

fields.name: Мега Алматы (ТРЦ)
fields.description: Almaty's largest mall: international brands, food court, cinema, Traveler's Coffee, entertainment. Two buildings.

fields.name: Кок-Жайляу (хайкинг-плато)
fields.description: Almaty's most popular hike: alpine plateau at 1700m, 10km from center. Night city panorama from summit, alpine flowers. For all levels — 3–4h round trip.

fields.name: Глэмпинг «Большая Медведица»
fields.description: Glazed domes 40 min from Almaty — luxury nature stay. Each dome with panoramic view, bathroom, furniture. 2024–2025 trend.

fields.name: Глэмпинг Menin House
fields.description: Domes with panoramic Almaty view in Koktobe district. Sauna, AC, all amenities. Sunset and sunrise over the city.

fields.name: Терренкур (городские тропы)
fields.description: Improved urban terrenkur trails — therapeutic walking routes in the foothills. Health trail with mountain and city views. Free, all-season.

fields.name: Панфилова 114 (ресторанный ряд)
fields.description: Iconic restaurant row on Panfilova St: summer terraces, verandas, atmosphere, hookahs, cocktails. One of Almaty's main hangout spots.

fields.name: Пикник в парке Аль-Фараби
fields.description: Trend: picnics against Almaty's most beautiful buildings along Al-Farabi avenue. Esentai Tower, mountains, modern architecture.

fields.name: Ресторанный ряд Медеу (Del Papa и др.)
fields.description: Cafés and restaurants at the foot of Medeu: Del Papa, mountain views, fresh air. Trend — lunch in the mountains after skating or hiking.

fields.name: Thrift & Vintage шопинг
fields.description: 2024–2025 trend: secondhand and vintage stores in Almaty. Areas: Green Bazaar, Panfilova St, Arbat. Local designers, Kazakh brands.

fields.name: Кофейня Almaty Coffee (обжарка)
fields.description: Local roastery café in the Golden Square: 8+ years of own-roast coffee. Best choice for those wanting local specialty.

fields.name: Озеро Алаколь
fields.description: Unique therapeutic salt lake: changes color from blue to violet. Medicinal water properties officially recognized. Top-10 summer destinations in Kazakhstan.

fields.name: Пляжный курорт Алаколь (Акши/Коктума)
fields.description: Hundreds of resorts on Alakol's shore: beaches, pools, 3 meals. Kazakhstan's 'sea' — alternative to abroad. South shore (Akshi, Koktuma) — best resorts.

fields.name: Лечебная грязь Алаколя
fields.description: Unique therapeutic mud from the bottom of Alakol: treats joint and skin conditions. Balneological procedures at resorts.

fields.name: Горячие источники Чунджа
fields.description: Thermal springs near Alakol, 300km from Almaty. Hot outdoor pools, therapeutic properties. All-season resort.

fields.name: Алаколь: рыбалка и дикий берег
fields.description: Alakol's wild south shore for tent camping and fishing: pike-perch, perch, carp. No tourists, silence, nature.

fields.name: Капчагай (Конаев) — обзор
fields.description: Main beach resort 80km from Almaty: reservoir, resorts, casinos, entertainment. Kazakhstan's gambling capital. Weekend getaway.

fields.name: Базы отдыха Капчагая
fields.description: Dozens of resorts on the Kapchagay reservoir: pools, beaches, BBQ, saunas. Affordable family getaway near Almaty.

fields.name: Капчагай — рыбалка и SUP
fields.description: Reservoir: fishing for pike-perch, pike, carp. SUP boarding, windsurfing, catamarans. Active water recreation 80km from Almaty.

fields.name: Ecozone «Самырсын» Капчагай
fields.description: Eco resort at Kapchagay: wooden log cabins, two pools, café, sauna. First shoreline. Family relaxation.

fields.name: Казино Капчагай
fields.description: Kazakhstan's gaming zone — the only legal one in the country. Several large casinos, restaurants, nightclubs. 80km from Almaty.

fields.name: Лунный каньон
fields.description: Little-known 'Lunar' canyon 1.5h from Almaty: grey-white rocks, moonscape. Often combined with Charyn and Black Canyon.

fields.name: 4 каньона за 1 день (тур)
fields.description: Popular day tour: Lunar + Black + Bestamak + Temirlik canyons. Different colors and shapes — all in one day from Almaty.

fields.name: Ферма Tau-Tas (глэмпинг)
fields.description: Glamping on a working farm in Alatau foothills: eco-cabins with mountain views, natural products, horses. Real mountain life.

fields.name: Горячие источники Жаркент
fields.description: Thermal springs near Zharkent, 300km from Almaty. Bathing in hot natural water surrounded by nature. Popular winter retreat.

fields.name: Бухтарминское водохранилище
fields.description: Huge reservoir in Altai mountains: beaches, fishing, yachting, resorts. 'Kazakhstan's Baltic Sea'. Popular with East Kazakhstan residents.

fields.name: Astana Hub (коворкинг)
fields.description: Astana's main coworking and tech hub: startups, IT, networking. Lectures, hackathons, international conferences.

fields.name: Кофейни Астаны (маршрут)
fields.description: Astana specialty cafés: Abr (branch here), Daily Coffee, local independents. Left bank — main coffee route.

fields.name: ALMA Fest Астана
fields.description: Kazakhstan's largest music festival: international and Kazakh artists, multiple stages, thousands of guests. Summer.

fields.name: Набережная Есиль (новый участок)
fields.description: New embankment section: art objects, summer terraces, cafés, cycling, SUP rental. Astana's main summer hangout 2024–2025.

fields.name: Восточный базар Туркестана
fields.description: New authentic eastern bazaar by the mausoleum walls: spices, dried fruits, Kazakh sweets, souvenirs. Built after city renovation.

fields.name: Шоу-программа «Ұлы Жібек Жолы»
fields.description: Annual Great Silk Road festival in Turkestan: horse shows, traditions, costumes, music. Main cultural event of South Kazakhstan.

fields.name: Отель Rixos Turkestan
fields.description: First 5-star hotel by Yasawi Mausoleum: pool, spa, restaurants with Kazakh cuisine. Turkestan — new luxury tourism center.

fields.name: Велодорожка вокруг Борового (20 км)
fields.description: Scenic cycling path 20–25km around Lake Borovoye: through forest, sanatoriums, viewpoints. Bike rental at embankment. 2024–2025 trend.

fields.name: Глэмпинг у озера Жукей (план 2025)
fields.description: New glamping at Lake Zhukey — part of Burabay development plan to 2029. Comfortable nature stay among pines. Opening 2025.

fields.name: Кафе и летники Борового
fields.description: Summer cafés and verandas on Borovoye embankment: cocktails, shashlik, local lake fish, kumiss. Resort atmosphere.

fields.name: Каспийская Ривьера (проект)
fields.description: New Caspian resort project worth 137 billion KZT: hotels, aquapark, golf. Expected 1.3 million tourists. Under construction 2024–2027.

fields.name: Эко-тур по подземным мечетям
fields.description: 3-day route: 5 underground mosques of Mangystau — Beket-Ata, Shakpak-Ata, Sultan-Epe, Masat-Ata, Beyt-Ata. Unique in the world.

fields.name: Discovery Coffee Астана
fields.description: Astana's main coffee chain: 6 locations, summer terraces, breakfasts from 8am, business lunches.

fields.name: Buno Coffee & Bar
fields.description: Trendy coffee-bar: breakfasts, specialty coffee, hookah, evening atmosphere. Grammy/Brewery group project.

fields.name: FRIENDS Breakfast Cafe
fields.description: Concept: all-day breakfasts from 8am to 10pm. Pancakes, eggs benedict, smoothies. Always a queue.

fields.name: Dio Grand Cafe
fields.description: New 2024 café with antiquity concept: inspired by Dionysus. European cuisine, steaks, seafood, vegan menu.

fields.name: Selfie Restaurant (Ritz-Carlton)
fields.description: Branch of Moscow's Selfie — world's top-100 restaurants. 18th floor of Ritz-Carlton. Open kitchen, seasonal produce.

fields.name: Вращающийся ресторан Beijing Palace
fields.description: Kazakhstan's only revolving restaurant at 120m: panorama of entire left bank. European + Chinese cuisine.

fields.name: Летние террасы левого берега
fields.description: Astana's seasonal summer spots: terraces with dance floors, rooftop verandas, VIP riverside terraces.

fields.name: Pasta la Vista (ботанический парк)
fields.description: Italian bistro in Astana's botanical park: pasta, seafood, cocktails. Greenery and coziness right in the park.

fields.name: Вертолётная экскурсия Бурабай–Астана
fields.description: New 2025 trend: scenic helicopter tours over Astana and Burabay. City aerial panorama.

fields.name: Туристический район Астаны (новый)
fields.description: New Astana tourism district: restaurants, hotels, cultural objects, walking zones. 2024–2026 project, partially open.

fields.name: Tary Shymkent
fields.description: Shymkent's top specialty café — Visit Shymkent cover. Beautiful interior, signature coffee, desserts.

fields.name: Ресторан «Океан» Шымкент
fields.description: Signature cuisine focused on seafood: oysters, fish, rolls. Breakfasts and luxury dinners. Best in its niche.

fields.name: LAПША Shymkent
fields.description: Popular Asian fusion restaurant. Motto: 'Don't stress yourself'. Wok, ramen, Asian dishes. Youth spot.

fields.name: Кофейни Шымкента (маршрут)
fields.description: Coffee route: Tary, DePier, Arbat cafés. Visit Shymkent guide to best cafés with rainbow latte and signature desserts.

fields.name: Производственный туризм Шымкента
fields.description: 2024 trend: factory tours — carpets, beer, ice cream. Watch it being made, then taste. Often free.

fields.name: Мечеть Сейитжана кари (новая, 2024)
fields.description: Shymkent's largest mosque, opened 2024: resembles Sheikh Zayed Mosque in Abu Dhabi. Islamic museum, madrasa, library.

fields.name: 9 мест для свиданий Шымкента
fields.description: Romantic location route: city-view restaurant, art studio, ceramics workshop, spa. By Visit Shymkent.

fields.name: The Bridge Актау
fields.description: Aktau's top restaurant: kutab, risotto, shrimp and mussel sauté, signature desserts. Updated 2025 menu.

fields.name: Теплый пляж Актау (проект 2025–2027)
fields.description: 137 billion KZT resort project: golf hotels, villas, aquapark, entertainment center on the Caspian shore.

fields.name: Bozjyra Safari Hotel (строится)
fields.description: First safari hotel at Bozzhira: 40 jobs, desert-style design. Opening 2026. Stay at the white Bozzhira peaks.

fields.name: Кофейни и летники Актау
fields.description: Trendy cafés on the Caspian embankment: sea-view cocktails, specialty coffee, sunset summer terraces.

fields.name: Wyndham Garden Aktau (новый отель)
fields.description: First new international brand hotel in Aktau: 45 jobs, international service standard, pool, spa.

fields.name: Zhagalau Resort Актау
fields.description: New 2024 coastal resort on the Caspian: beach, pool, restaurants. 800 million KZT investment.

fields.name: SAP-бординг на Каспии
fields.description: SUP board, kayak rental, kitesurfing on the Caspian Sea. 2024–2025 trend — water sports in Aktau.

fields.name: Вертолётная экскурсия над Бурабаем
fields.description: 2025 novelty: scenic helicopter flights over Burabay's lakes and mountains. Zhumbaktas, Okzhetpes, Borovoye from above.

fields.name: Аквапарк у озера Катарколь (план 2025)
fields.description: Year-round 12,000 m² waterpark at Katarkol lake — building 2025. First indoor waterpark in Burabay.

fields.name: Лыжная база и зимний Бурабай
fields.description: Winter Burabay: ski bases on slopes, snowmobiles, husky tours, ice sculptures. Developing per 2025–2029 plan.

fields.name: Прокат SUP и водные виды спорта
fields.description: SUP board rental, boat stations on Lake Borovoye. Windsurfing, kayak. Burabay summer trend 2024–2025.

fields.name: Новые кафе и рестораны Семея
fields.description: Semiey's food scene is growing: new Italian and Asian restaurants, specialty cafés, restobars with live music.

fields.name: Достоевский & Абай — литературный тур
fields.description: Author tour of Dostoevsky and Abai's Semiey: house-museums, monuments, Irtysh embankment, historic architecture.

fields.name: Рафтинг и SUP на Иртыше
fields.description: New trend: rafting and SUP boarding on the Irtysh. River tours along the embankment and beyond the city.

fields.name: Кофейни и летники Павлодара
fields.description: Trendy cafés on the Irtysh embankment: specialty coffee, breakfasts, summer verandas with river views.

fields.name: Баянаул — пляж и глэмпинг
fields.description: Growing trend: glamping and eco-cabins at Zhasybay lake. Mountain beach 100km from Pavlodar. Burabay alternative.

fields.name: Баянаул: треккинг и скала «Спящий рыцарь»
fields.description: Bayanaul's main trekking route: 'Sleeping Knight' rock, Akbet mountain, steppe panorama. Growing popularity among urban hikers.

fields.name: Кофейни и гастросцена УК
fields.description: Growing food scene: specialty cafés, author cuisine restaurants, restobars with Irtysh views.

fields.name: Oi-Qaragai горнолыжный кластер
fields.description: New Oi-Qaragai ski cluster worth $150M: world-class runs in the Altai mountains, 1200 jobs by 2025.

fields.name: Приключенческий туризм Алтая (УК)
fields.description: Rafting on Bukhtarma, trekking to Belukha, horse tours, mountaineering. UKhN — main base for Kazakhstan Altai adventures.

fields.name: Кофейни и рестораны Кокшетау
fields.description: Growing food scene: cafés by Lake Kopa, summer terraces, cozy restaurants with Kazakh and European cuisine.

fields.name: Зеренда (курортная зона)
fields.description: Little-known resort area 40km from Kokshetau: pine forests, clean lakes, resorts. Quiet alternative to Burabay.

fields.name: Гастросцена Петропавловска
fields.description: New cafés and restaurants in Kazakhstan's northernmost regional center: specialty coffee, breakfasts, author cuisine.

fields.name: Ишимская набережная (летний сезон)
fields.description: Summer season on the Ishim embankment: beach, boat rental, cafes, evening walks. Main summer spot in North Kazakhstan.

fields.name: Кофейни и рестобары Атырау
fields.description: Oil city with growing food scene: specialty cafés, restobars, summer terraces on the Ural embankment.

fields.name: Рыболовный тур Атырау (осётр)
fields.description: Organized fishing tours: licensed sturgeon and beluga fishing on the Ural and Caspian. Unique experience.

fields.name: Гастросцена и кофейни Тараза
fields.description: New cafés in historic Taraz: specialty coffee, breakfasts, Uzbek-Kazakh cuisine. Southern flair.

fields.name: Айша-Биби + фотосессия
fields.description: Aisha-Bibi mausoleum as a photo location: unique terracotta carving creates unbeatable backdrop. Dawn and dusk best.

fields.name: Улытау — сакральный туризм
fields.description: Growing trend: pilgrimage and spiritual tours to the Ulytau mountains — heart of the Kazakh people.

fields.name: Арал — эко-тур к трагедии моря
fields.description: Growing eco-tourism: tour to the dried Aral Sea, ships in the desert, Aralsk port. Unique mindful travel experience.

fields.name: AUYL
fields.description: #1 restaurant in Kazakhstan WHERETOEAT 2025. Modern nomadic cuisine at Medeu gorge — ЮНЕСКО noted. Chef Alexander Proshenkov.

fields.name: Rifugio del Monte
fields.description: #2 WHERETOEAT 2025. Alpine chic at Chimbulak: champagne and fondue, gold-glazed lobster, mountain sunsets.

fields.name: Nuala
fields.description: #4 WHERETOEAT 2025. Wine bistro in the Central Post Office: 800 wine labels, octopus, wagyu, horse mortadella.

fields.name: Огонёк
fields.description: #5 WHERETOEAT 2025. Signature restaurant in Kazakhstan's top-5. Refined cuisine, live fire, cozy atmosphere.

fields.name: La Barca Fish & Wine
