fields.description: #6 WHERETOEAT 2025. Mediterranean all-inclusive: oysters, turbot, linguini, Chablis. Kazakhstan's best seafood.

fields.name: SPIROS
fields.description: #8 WHERETOEAT 2025. High-level Greek cuisine — unique in Central Asia. Fresh fish, grill, Greek wines, Aegean atmosphere.

fields.name: Хороший год
fields.description: #9 WHERETOEAT 2025. Cozy bistro: all-day breakfasts, halva raf, wine, comfort food. Almaty intelligentsia's favorite.

fields.name: Astra Grand Cafe
fields.description: #10 WHERETOEAT 2025. Grand café with rich menu and luxurious interior. Top-10 best restaurants in Kazakhstan.

fields.name: Sandyq
fields.description: Best Kazakh cuisine restaurant by WHERETOEAT 2025. Traditional dishes in modern interpretation — new Kazakh gastronomy.

fields.name: Akami
fields.description: Media Choice WHERETOEAT 2025. Japanese gastro-luxury in the Golden Square: roe rolls, crab gyoza, sparkling foam.

fields.name: Gruppo 63
fields.description: Bar of the Year WHERETOEAT 2025. Kazakhstan's best cocktail bar — signature cocktails, Italian concept, style and atmosphere.

fields.name: Qazaq Gourmet
fields.description: #7 WHERETOEAT 2025, Astana. New-generation signature Kazakh cuisine — reinvention of national dishes at the highest level.

fields.name: cafe Alma
fields.description: #19 WHERETOEAT 2025. Charming city café: all-day breakfasts, halva raf, signature desserts, wine. Brand chef Andrei Titov.

fields.name: Lavka by Proshenkov
fields.description: Signature bakery-café by chef Alexander Proshenkov (Kazakhstan's #1 chef). Sourdough with Kazakh DNA, pastries, sandwiches.

fields.name: Renee Cafe
fields.description: Top-17 WHERETOEAT 2025. Aesthetic café with signature menu, beautiful interior and atmosphere. Popular with youth and creative class.

fields.name: Percorso
fields.description: Ultima Guide 2025. Flawless pizza and pasta, vermentino and gelato — an aesthetic Italian restaurant. For true Italy lovers.

fields.name: Dragonfly Izakaya
fields.description: Ultima Guide 2025. Social izakaya: cocktails, foie gras sushi, neon, techno. Evening spot for those seeking an experience.

fields.name: Beefeater Dostyk
fields.description: Ultima Guide 2025. Brutal meat restaurant: aged steaks, brisket, venison, 500 wines, heart-shaped dessert.

fields.name: Manana
fields.description: Ultima Guide 2025. Georgian cuisine from classic to modern: truffle khinkali, gebzhalia by family recipe. Almaty's best Georgian.

fields.name: Benedict
fields.description: Ultima Guide + WHERETOEAT 2025. Charming café: all-day breakfasts, halva raf, wine, comfort food. Cult breakfast spot.

fields.name: Bitanga
fields.description: Ultima Guide 2025. Modern Ukrainian cuisine on Panfilova: borscht with pampushka, burger with draniki, horseradish vodka.

fields.name: Raw
fields.description: Ultima Guide 2025. Spectacular pan-Asia: rolls, gyoza, neon, techno, sake cocktails. Evening spot with a show.

fields.name: Cheeseria
fields.description: Top-15 WHERETOEAT 2025. Artisan cheese restaurant: raclette, fondue, cheese boards, fresh cheese. Unique format in Almaty.

fields.name: KazMyaso Platforma
fields.description: Top-16 WHERETOEAT 2025. Finest Kazakh meat: aged beef, steaks, burgers with local meat. Supporting local producers.

fields.name: Del Papa (Медеу)
fields.description: Italian restaurant at the foot of Medeu — mountains, fresh air, pasta and pizza in the hills. Cult spot after skating or hiking.

fields.name: Jer (ресторан)
fields.description: Jer restaurant — modern Kazakh cuisine in a beautiful space. Signature reinvention of traditional dishes, stylish interior, local produce.

fields.name: Blend Bar
fields.description: One of Almaty's top bars: signature cocktails, style, atmosphere. Evening gathering spot for the city crowd.

fields.name: Giardino
fields.description: Top-18 WHERETOEAT 2025. Italian garden restaurant: pasta, pizza, seafood, Italian wines in a cozy green space.

fields.name: Bella Ciao
fields.description: Italian restaurant honored by Accademia Italiana della Cucina — official recognition of authentic Italian cuisine. Only one in Kazakhstan.

fields.name: Pier
fields.description: Top-12 WHERETOEAT 2025. Waterside restaurant with signature menu. Pier atmosphere, fresh seafood, refined cuisine.

fields.name: COCO
fields.description: WE FRY ON FIRE — WHERETOEAT 2025. Kazakhstan's best fried food. Next-level street food: crispy chicken, signature sauces.

fields.name: Aqqu Central Cafe
fields.description: Top-11 WHERETOEAT 2025. Central café with signature menu, beautiful interior. Meeting place in the heart of Almaty.

fields.title: Вечер джаза
fields.description: Лучшие джазовые музыканты города в одном концерте. Прозвучат классические и современные композиции.

fields.title: Гастро-ужин от шефа
fields.description: Эксклюзивный ужин из 5 блюд от шеф-повара ресторана. В меню авторские позиции и винное сопровождение.

fields.title: Мастер-класс по акварели
fields.description: Научитесь основам акварельной живописи за 3 часа. Все материалы включены в стоимость.

fields.title: Спектакль "Ревизор"
fields.description: Классическая комедия Гоголя в современной постановке. Блистательная игра актёров.

fields.title: Выставка современного искусства
fields.description: Работы молодых казахстанских художников. Живопись, скульптура, инсталляции.

fields.title: Йога в парке
fields.description: Бесплатное занятие йогой на свежем воздухе. Подходит для любого уровня подготовки.

fields.title: Концерт симфонического оркестра
fields.description: Произведения Чайковского и Рахманинова в исполнении симфонического оркестра.

fields.title: Фестиваль уличной еды
fields.description: Лучшие стритфуд-проекты города. Бургеры, пицца, азиатская кухня и десерты.

fields.title: Детский спектакль
fields.description: Сказка "Три поросёнка" для самых маленьких зрителей. Яркие куклы и весёлая музыка.
